nasb.text: and as he sowed, some seeds fell beside the road, and the birds came and ate them up.

esv.text: And as he sowed, some seeds fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured them.

cnv.text: 撒的時候，有的落在路旁，小鳥飛來就吃掉了。

ccb.text: 撒种的时候，有些种子落在路旁，被飞鸟吃掉了；

csbs.text: 他撒的时候，有些种子落在路边，飞鸟来把它们吃掉了。
